# Farlands Reforged Fabric

Fabric build for Minecraft `26.2`.

Tiny Fabric version of Farlands Reforged. Restores classic Far Lands-style terrain generation by preserving Perlin noise coordinate precision. Includes `/farlands`, config, and the `...where am I?` advancement.

## Build

```bash
./gradlew build
python scripts/verify_artifact.py
```
